race.comment: One for the babies. SCARLENA (5) has hit the top four in all four starts to date and this is not an overly strong affair. Has placed two from three over this track and trip and gets some weight relief with the 2kg claim. Rates the testing material against this line-up. TAMBO'S SISTER (6) has been right there in both career efforts and maps ideally for this from gate two. Looms as the main danger. SIXTY NINE GRANGE (10) was in the betting when facing the starter for the first time and where there's smoke there's fire. Wiggins sticks in the saddle and rates a genuine top-three contender with natural improvement. BOOMIOUS (2) just missed the frame in both outings before being tipped out for further time to furnish. Can return a winner. DIVINE SOUL (3) is facing the starter for the first time but won't need to be a superstar to be competitive against this lot. Keep safe.
